brand.tagline: Exploring the Infinite Possibilities of Narrative

products.title: Our Games
products.subtitle: Discover our meticulously crafted immersive gaming experiences

items.title: The Phantom Of The Museum
items.description: The Phantom Of The Museum is an indie game that combines elements of puzzle solving and exploration.

items.title: The Tale of Spring City
items.description: Ziqing Xu, a young girl from Spring City. Her father mysteriously disappeared soon after. During a strange turn of events, she suddenly gains the ability to see into the supernatural realm—the so-called "Yin Yan." Will she be able to uncover the truth?

team.title: Our Team
team.intro: We are a passionate game development team. Since the studio's founding, we have been dedicated to crafting games with unique aesthetic styles and profound emotional resonance. We believe that every game is a brand new narrative adventure, and our goal is to help players discover their own stories and emotional connections within the games.
team.vision: Our vision is to create game experiences that touch people's hearts, allowing players to feel the flow of real emotions in virtual worlds. We pursue not the accumulation of technology, but the expression of emotions and resonance.

members.name: Kingdy Jin
